hero.subtext: A Tunisian company specialized in delivering integrated business support solutions with efficiency and professionalism.

about.title: Trusted support for ambitious business growth
about.description: We combine local insight with global standards to support organizations with precision, discretion, and dependable execution.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.description: Connecting ambitious teams with carefully matched talent for lasting impact.

logistics.description: Coordinating reliable operational support with an emphasis on speed and clarity.

businessDevelopment.description: Strengthening partnerships and growth opportunities with strategic, measured execution.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Providing thoughtful guidance that helps clients navigate complex decisions with confidence.

services.title: Integrated Solutions for Every Need
services.description: We provide comprehensive business support solutions designed to help your company operate with efficiency and professionalism.

businessAdmin.title: Business Administration
businessAdmin.description: We provide integrated administrative solutions that help businesses run smoothly and efficiently.

logistics.title: Logistics Support
logistics.description: Professional logistics services ensuring fast, safe, and reliable delivery.

recruitment.title: Recruitment & Talent Acquisition
recruitment.description: We help you find the right talent to grow your team and achieve your goals.

operations.title: Operational Optimization
operations.description: Enhancing operational performance and reducing costs through smart and effective solutions.

whyUs.title: Built on Trust, Delivered with Excellence
whyUs.description: What sets us apart is a combination of deep expertise, speed, and solutions built around you.

expertise.title: High Expertise
expertise.description: A team with deep experience and proven skills.

execution.title: Fast Execution
execution.description: Commitment to speed and quality in every project.

tailored.title: Tailored Solutions
tailored.description: Custom solutions designed to fit your business.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about who we are and how we work.

whoWeAre.question: Who is Prime Global?
whoWeAre.answer: Prime Global is a Tunisian company based in Sousse, specialized in delivering integrated business support solutions with efficiency and professionalism.

servicesOffered.question: What services does Prime Global offer?
servicesOffered.answer: We offer four core services: business administration, logistics support, recruitment and talent acquisition, and operational optimization.

location.question: Where is Prime Global located?
location.answer: We are based in Sousse, Tunisia.

getStarted.question: How do I get started with Prime Global?
getStarted.answer: Reach out via WhatsApp, email, or the contact form on this site, and our team will follow up to understand your needs and how we can help.

industriesServed.question: Does Prime Global work with businesses outside Tunisia?
industriesServed.answer: We combine Tunisian expertise with a global standard of service. Get in touch to discuss your specific location and requirements.

contactMethods.question: How can I contact Prime Global?
contactMethods.answer: You can reach us by WhatsApp, email at info@primeglobal.tn, or through our website, primeglobal.tn.

contact.title: Let's Start a Conversation
contact.description: Reach out via WhatsApp, email, or the form below — our team will get back to you shortly.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: Thank you — your message has been sent. We'll be in touch soon.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or reach us on WhatsApp.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.

footer.tagline: Tunisian expertise, delivered to a global standard.
